name: Kenjo
description: HR software for SMBs. Monitor employee records and people operations.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Kenjo as an admin
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > API keys
3. Click GENERATE NEW API KEY
4. Copy the API key immediately (it is shown only once)
5. Paste it below

Note: API access must be activated by the Kenjo Customer Success team first.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Generated in Kenjo Settings > Integrations > API keys
